response.justification: Strong senior fullstack profile with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Solid match on primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) from recent Stripe and Shopify roles, plus exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) which directly aligns with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship through TDD, workshops, and open-source contributions. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and no Kotlin experience, but Java is present and the breadth of languages suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: 13+ years experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React track record at Stripe and Shopify
Direct AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source projects, workshops, and teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms work pre-2018)
Vitest not explicitly listed, though testing expertise is evident from Fluent-Asserts and Trial projects

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack depth at top-tier companies
AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in primary/secondary stack
